# Crypto wallet negative corpus — should NOT trigger
# Color hex codes, short strings, invalid base58, non-address identifiers
Color: #de0B29 (too short for ETH)
CSS color #742d35Cc
HTML hex 0xABCDEF (only 6 chars, not 40)
IPv6 address 0x1234:5678:9abc:def0
ISBN 978-3-16-148410-0
Barcode 1234567890128
Base64 encoded data QW5vdGhlclRlc3Q=
Order ID 1A2B3C4D5E6F (too short)
Product code 3QJmV3qf (8 chars only)
Git commit hash 1LoVGDgRs9hTfTNJNu (too short)
Serial 0xDEADBEEF (8 chars only)
MAC 0x00:1A:2B:3C:4D:5E
Hex dump 0x7f000001 (IP in hex)
Register value 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF (16 chars not 40)
Device ID bc1q123 (too short)
Short code 3Abc (too short)
Color value #1A1zP1 (mixed chars, too short)
Reference 1BvBMSEY (8 chars)
Test ID 3J98t1W (7 chars)
Tracking bc1q (way too short)
